content: Phase 1: New Production-first Hero (manufacturer angle, not product)
Phase 2: Section-based layout (min-h-screen on desktop, scroll-snap proximity)
Phase 3: Right-side vertical section nav (01-10, active state, hover labels)
Phase 4: Reorder HomePage sections per new spec
Phase 5: Transform FinalCTA into contact-footer screen (replaces regular Footer)
Phase 6: Test all viewports + take screenshots for verification
